_note: The owner's running ledger of trading theses, captured verbatim-in-spirit as he dumps them. Each is a HYPOTHESIS, not a rule: the Phase-4 proving harness (src/validation/registry.py) registers it, the discovery layer builds the signal that tests it, and it earns its way onto proposal cards only after surviving out-of-sample (decision #50/#63). `testable_signal` sketches what the engine must compute to score it; `builds` names the layer that would carry it; `status` is idea|scoping|building|registered|validated|killed. This file is the human capture surface — edit freely; nothing here trades until validated.

hypotheses.statement: In a flat market, capital doesn't exit — it rotates by exhaustion. When a leading sector/instrument is extended AND its volatility rises (choppy top), money flees it and hunts whatever has been stagnant/basing; that laggard then breaks out. Buy the BASING laggard WHEN the former leader is extended + going high-vol, not just because the laggard is cheap.
hypotheses.mechanism: leader is EXHAUSTED only when BOTH fire together: high trailing return (extension threshold) AND rising realized volatility (choppy top). Either alone is a false alarm — big return with calm vol is a healthy trend still worth riding; rising vol without a big prior run is just noise. Exhaustion -> capital flight -> inflow to a low-vol basing laggard -> laggard breakout (volume/delivery confirming).
examples: bonds + financial services becoming the destination as the broad index has gone ~2 years without real upside
hypotheses.leader_exhaustion_trigger: CONJUNCTIVE (owner, 2026-07-11): trailing return above an extension threshold AND realized volatility rising vs its own recent baseline. Both required; thresholds to be calibrated on the rotation radar (candidate: return >= ~X% over the leader-run horizon AND vol up vs its trailing median).
hypotheses.testable_signal: A rotation radar: rank sectors/instruments by trailing return (multi-horizon) AND realized volatility. Flag LEADERS = high trailing return AND rising vol (the conjunctive exhaustion trigger above). Flag LAGGARDS = flat trailing return + low/compressing vol (basing). Fire when a flagged laggard breaks its base range with volume/delivery-% confirmation while >=1 leader is simultaneously in exhaustion. Score: does the laggard breakout outperform over the next N weeks?
confirmation_layers: FII/DII flows rotating out of the leader group into the laggard group (flows_tracker)
delivery % spike on the laggard breakout day
hypotheses.builds: a new sector/instrument relative-strength + volatility-regime tracker (Phase-5 rotation radar) feeding daily_context; registered as a candidate_pattern once the radar emits it
caveats: needs a sector->constituents map (partly in config/entity_groups.json + config/sector_links.json; needs a broader sector index set)
'basing then breakout' must be defined precisely (range compression + a real range-break, not noise) or it over-fires
survivorship: only patterns that survive the walk-forward trial reach a card

hypotheses.statement: The Indian post-COVID housing cycle is topping, and its unwind cascades through equities. A big structural TREND (months-to-years), but with an actionable near-term POINT: the earliest tell is investors (not end-users) seeking liquidity first — visible as smart-money distribution in realty/HFC/infra names before it shows in the news.
causal_chain: COVID: salaries rose (tech/WFH); real estate crashed/stagnated (no renting, no buying)
post-COVID: spend rotated experiences -> flats; limited supply -> prices rose
price rise pulled in INVESTORS not just end-users (speculative demand); developers built more -> supply maxed
now: supply peaked, salaries stalled, mid-level AI layoffs, cost of living up
under pressure the FIRST cut is the large home-loan EMI
investors seek liquidity FIRST (exit before retail); then SOME retail follows (not all)
cascade: real-estate cos with unsold inventory -> banks/HFCs with mortgage books (rising defaults/NPAs) -> infra/construction cos hit by developer payment defaults
hypotheses.point_for_now: The investors-exit-first step is the near-term watchable trigger and the one THIS system can see early: sustained smart-money DISTRIBUTION in realty/HFC/infra names (entity-affinity + deals), FII/DII rotating out of the sector (flows), plus the news red-flag layer catching the first developer payment default / HFC NPA uptick / pledge spike. Confluence of these = the cycle-top early warning.
hypotheses.expression: PAPER + long-biased engine has no naked single-stock short. Near-term this is (a) a SECTOR VETO on fresh long setups in these groups when the distribution tell is active, and (b) a VALIDATION target — track whether distribution in the linked names actually precedes sector drawdown (the harness scores it before it's ever trusted). Index bearish view can express via a defined-risk bear put spread only if/when a real signal validates.
hypotheses.testable_signal: A sector-stress composite over the affected_groups: (net smart-money distribution across the group) + (FII/DII net outflow from the group) + (news red-flags: developer default / HFC NPA / pledge) + (rising group volatility). Fire an early-warning advisory when >=N of these align; score whether the group underperforms over the next 1-3 months.
hypotheses.builds: reuses entity-affinity (distribution), flows_tracker, the news red-flag classes (H-prior), and daily_context; needs the affected_groups added to config/entity_groups.json (realty/HFC/infra clusters) + a sector-stress composite in the Phase-5 discovery layer
caveats: structural + slow — this is a regime bias and early-warning, NOT a precise short entry; timing a housing top is famously hard and can be years early
confirmation bias risk: a bearish narrative is seductive — this MUST earn validation before any card treats it as signal (decision #50)

macro-driven: much of the real tell (EMI stress, HFC NPAs, developer cashflow) is fundamental data the engine doesn't ingest yet; the engine's honest edge here is only the market-visible slice (distribution, flows, price/vol, disclosed news)
